mapper.select: SELECT FIND_PROD_NAME(prod_code) AS prod_name, ROUND(SUM(order_quantity) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(order_quantity)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage FROM order_detail d JOIN orders o ON d.order_code = o.order_code WHERE REGISTRATION_DATE >= REGISTRATION_DATE-7 GROUP BY prod_code, FIND_PROD_NAME(prod_code) ORDER BY prod_code
SELECT FIND_MAT_NAME(mat_code) mat_name, SUM(store_quantity) come FROM mat_store WHERE store_date >= SYSDATE-7 GROUP BY FIND_MAT_NAME(mat_code)

SELECT SUM(d.order_quantity) orderQuantity, TO_CHAR(o.registration_date,'dy')day FROM order_detail d JOIN orders o ON (o.order_code=d.order_code) WHERE o.registration_date >= SYSDATE-7 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(o.registration_date,'dy'),TO_CHAR(o.registration_date,'d'), o.registration_date order by o.registration_date
SELECT FIND_PROD_NAME(prod_code), SUM(instruct_quantity) FROM work_instruct_detail GROUP BY FIND_PROD_NAME(prod_code)

SELECT SUM(release_quantity) mat_used, FIND_MAT_NAME(s.mat_code) mat_named FROM mat_release r JOIN mat_hold h ON(r.mat_hold_code=h.mat_hold_code) JOIN mat_store s ON(h.lot = s.lot) WHERE r.release_date >= SYSDATE-7 GROUP BY FIND_MAT_NAME(s.mat_code)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE TO_CHAR(registration_date,'yyyyMMdd') = TO_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mat_order WHERE TO_CHAR(order_date,'yyyyMMdd') = TO_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prod_store WHERE TO_CHAR(store_date,'yyyyMMdd') = TO_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_code) FROM prod_release WHERE TO_CHAR(release_date,'yyyyMMdd') = TO_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd')
